creator: 4721@hushmail.com
text:
* update devel/avr-binutils from 2.20.1 to 2.22
* use vendor patchset directly instead of importing into the ports collection
* add LICENSE
* remove no longer needed workaround for MACHINE_ARCH (builds on amd64 and i386)
* clean add-plist-post target

patch is base64 encoded and xz compressed, to bypass 100KB limit on patch submission.
